nasb.text: But Jesus said, “Do not hinder him, for there is no one who will perform a miracle in My name, and be able soon afterward to speak evil of Me.

esv.text: But Jesus said, “Do not stop him, for no one who does a mighty work in my name will be able soon afterward to speak evil of me.

cnv.text: 耶穌說：“不要禁止他，因為沒有人能奉我的名行了神蹟，又立刻毀謗我。

ccb.text: 耶稣说：“不要阻止他，因为没有人奉我的名行过神迹后，会很快毁谤我。

csbs.text: 耶稣说：“不要阻止他。因为没有人奉我的名行了神迹以后，会立即诽谤我。
